English (Source): Which team are you supporting in the 2026 FIFA World Cup? All data will be highlighted for your team.
48 teams, 1,104 real players. DF/MF/FW/OVR ratings from the dataset. Editable manually via Power Table.
xG = 0.013 × (FW×0.65+MF×0.35 / DF×0.65+MF×0.35)^Upex × 90. Poisson sampling. Goals assists yellow/red cards injuries and substitutions generated per match.
Low (1.0) = many upsets. High (5.0) = favorites always win. Default 1.5 (balanced).
Every simulation uses a seeded PRNG. Same seed = identical tournament. Use Sim Browser → 📋 Report to replay any simulation's full events.
The best 8 third-placed teams qualify from 12 groups. All 495 scenarios resolved via FIFA's official Annex C lookup table.
